items.title: Nintendo confirms un-announced Switch 2 games already prepared for launch this year
items.summary:
Nintendo had a giant 2025 with the launch of its next-generation console, record-breaking sales, and some top-tier game releases. This year has been a bit of a down turn – as the new Super Mario Galaxy Movie caught fire at the box office, Switch 2 sales have slowed, all of its big announcements for 2026 might have already leaked, and the stock price is dropping. It’s not all bad news though, and it has now confirmed there are still some as of yet (officially) announced first-party titles set to launch this year for its new console.

items.title: EGO’s three Multi-Head combo kits with two attachments get up to 37% savings to new all-time low prices of $370 each
items.summary:
After holding out all last month at new low prices, Amazon is increasing the savings on three EGO Power+ 56V Multi-Head Combo Kits to the best prices to date. My personal pick is the Cordless Electric Multi-Head Combo Kit with a Power Head, 15-inch string trimmer, and an extra 10-inch pole saw attachment for $369.99 shipped, with options below to score the string trimmer attachment with either an edger or brush cutter attachment for the same price. Before last month’s deal, we only ever saw this package come down from $589 to go as low as $518, but that was tossed aside for a massive price cut to $390 across all the bundles. Now, you’re getting an additional $20 savings tacked on for $219 in total savings off the full price, which is what you’d be paying to pick these same models up individually, landing things at a new all-time low. As I mentioned, there are also bundle options for the string trimmer/power head and an extra 12-inch brush cutter attachment at $369.99 shipped, as well as the trimmer/power head package with an extra 8-inch carbon fiber edger also at $369.99 shipped.
